title: Realistic MC+
description: A Better And (hopefully) More Stable Modpack Then The First.
body:
## This Modpack will no longer be Receiving Updates

# A Realistic Modpack That Aim's The Make Minecraft the most realistic It Can Be

**MAY NEED A BEEFY PC TO RUN, PLEASE MESS WITH SETTINGS TO TRY MAKE IT RUN BETTER FOR YOU**

[Boxed Page (Website)](https://sites.google.com/view/boxedmc/modpacks/rmc_1)

Official RMC+ [discord server](https://discord.gg/J457fRMRVS) With It's own SMP

<details>
<summary>Default Controls</summary>
. = Toggle Dynamic HUD
  
F6 = Toggle First Person Model

F10 = Open Presence Footstep SettingsCaps Lock = mute VC Microphone

v = VC GUI

G = VC Group

N = disable VC

H = hide voice chat icons

] = Open Xaero World Map Settings

M = open World Map

c = Zoom

z + Toggle Zoom

R = reload Shaders (Causes a lot of lag if spammed)

O = shader pack selection screen

K = Toggle Shaders


</details>


<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>

Concurrent Chunk Management Engine 

Distant Horizons 

Iris 

Sodium 

Indium 

Noisium 

Tectonic 

Terralith 

TerraBlender 

Camera Overhaul 

Cloth Config v4 

Lithosphere 

EntityCulling 

Simple Voice Chat 

Lithium 

Mod Menu 

FirstPerson 

NotEnoughAnimations 

Continuity 

Dynamic FPS 

AppleSkin 

LambDynamicLights 

Xaero's World Map 

Zoomify 

3d-Skin-Layers 

LazyDFU 

Krypton 

Presence Footsteps 

Sound Physics Remastered 

Model Gap Fix 

Falling Leaves 

YetAnotherConfigLib 

Fabric API 

Auto HUD 

EnhancedVisuals 

CreativeCore 

Spoiled 

Thermite 

FallingTree 

Dehydration 

HT's TreeChop 

Body Health System 

Boids 

Nyf's Spiders 

Danger Close 

Fire arrows ignite fire 

Realistic Fire Spread 

Realistic Sleep 

Realistic Bees 

Forge Config API Port 

CompleteConfig 

MonoLib 

Collective 

Cloth Config API (Fabric/Forge/NeoForge) 

Fabric Language Kotlin 

True Darkness [Fabric] - Updated Fork 

Mobs Attempt Parkour 

[ETF] Entity Texture Features 

[EMF] Entity Model Features

</details>

**WARNING: Nyf's Spiders (A Mod In The Modpack) Is Literally a mod that makes them walk of walls and roofs, if you fear spiders please remove or disable this mod!**
